findings.title: Source Row Inventory misses required columns
findings.details: The inventory must expose source row identity, package, scope decision and ATOM/GAP mapping.
evidence: missing=field_or_action, in_scope, mapped_atom_or_gap, package_id, requirement_codes, source_ref
columns=source_row_id, xhtml_ref, req_id, column_button, column_business_need, column_action, column_description
findings.recommended_action: Rewrite the table with the canonical columns from source-row-inventory-format.md.

findings.title: source-selection.md misses required context fields
findings.details: Downstream stages need an explicit FT slug and selection status from the source locator.
findings.recommended_action: Add `selected_ft_slug` and `selection_status` to the Context section.

findings.title: source-selection.md misses required sections
findings.details: The source selection artifact must be a reproducible handoff, not only a placeholder file.
findings.recommended_action: Add the required sections from references/agent/source-selection-format.md before routing to ft-scope-analyzer.

findings.title: source-selection.md misses mandatory XHTML source section
findings.details: Main FT XHTML availability must be recorded before scope, writer, reviewer or iteration routing.
findings.recommended_action: Add `Machine-Readable XHTML Source` with `xhtml_available: yes | no`.

findings.title: Decision log misses Decision Log section
findings.details: agent-decision-log.md must contain a `## Decision Log` table with observable intermediate decisions, not hidden chain-of-thought.

findings.title: Active source extraction has quality risk
findings.details: Most sections were inferred from heading styles without numeric section ids.
findings.recommended_action: Inspect source extraction before relying on downstream test cases.

findings.title: Active source extraction has quality risk
findings.details: No numeric section ids were detected; section filtering may be unreliable.
findings.recommended_action: Inspect source extraction before relying on downstream test cases.

findings.title: Active source extraction has quality risk
findings.details: Some source blocks are larger than max_chars and require defensive splitting.
findings.recommended_action: Inspect source extraction before relying on downstream test cases.

findings.title: Workflow state does not link a stage session log
findings.details: Source locator, scope analyzer, writer, reviewer and iteration stages should persist a decision/audit session log so later analysis does not depend on chat history.
findings.recommended_action: Create `<stage>-session-log.md` in the current handoff folder and link it from `latest_artifacts` as `session_log` or `<stage>_session_log`.

checks.name: source-selection-xhtml-section
checks.details: Mandatory XHTML source section is missing.

checks.name: workflow-state-session-log
checks.details: Stage session log is not linked.

checks.name: workflow-state-stage-transition
checks.details: Stage transition contract has no active prompt requirement.

checks.name: source-support-duplicate-manifest
checks.details: Duplicate source/support files are covered by artifact manifest or absent.

checks.name: coverage-gap-inventory
checks.details: Coverage gap inventory section not present.
